papers_mined.title: Quipu / Khipu (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Inca knot-based encoding device; decimal positional system; 3 knot types × 2 orientations; position from top cord encodes power-of-10; multi-modal: color + fiber + weave-direction encode further information.

papers_mined.title: Quipu Inca Record-Keeping World History Encyclopedia
papers_mined.note: Khipu cords categorized by color/order/number; selective access via untying + re-tying knots between deposit sections.

papers_mined.title: Decipher Ancient Inca String Code Nat Geo Education
papers_mined.note: Khipu reading sequence — cord-by-cord top-to-bottom; gating by cord-category before content decode.

papers_mined.title: Inka Khipu Smarthistory
papers_mined.note: Khipu kept by professional khipu-kamayuk who selectively tie/untie knots; encoding includes both numerical + narrative information.
